human_verification.notes: Reviewed issue #1262 requirements, validated defense-specific boundaries, scenario coverage, research-summary mapping, source quality fields, and completion/exception handling expectations for proposal operations.

review_notes: All required scenario IDs are represented and passing in results.
All required abilities are declared and validated in the functionality map.
Source package includes required authority metadata and refusal/adjacency behavior.
No retained implementation claim is made without separate promotion context.

specialist_owned_evidence: Proposal operations outputs are explicitly bounded to in-lane evidence, state transitions, exceptions, and escalation rather than legal/commercial decisions.
Defense terminology, transport/equipment dependencies, and mission-readiness artifacts are required before completion status changes.
Refusal and escalation cases explicitly cover missing tenant policy, source conflicts, adjacent-lane handoffs, and safety blockers.
notes: Runtime remains specification-based and does not claim retained-implementation behavior.
Promotion to retained implementation requires explicit governance signoff and repeated safe operation evidence.
Commercial and deployment notes document retrieval requirements, tenant adaptation assumptions, and rollback controls for validated rollout.
